The '''Junction City cantina''' of [[Feriae Junction/Legends|Feriae Junction]] was a rough place where [[Death/Legends|death]] was no great novelty.

However, in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Beilert Valance/Legends|Beilert Valance]] killed [[Marko Tyne]] so savagely even the normally desensitized regulars were shocked. Valance had been making a habit of capturing patrons with bounties on their heads, so much that it was impacting business.<ref name="marvel27" />
